stemHtml: To prevent Noise-Induced Hearing Loss (NIHL), the following measures can be taken:

options.a: Avoiding prolonged exposure, over five hours, to noise in excess of 5 GHz.
options.b: Wearing hearing protection, ear plugs and noise cancelling headsets.
options.d: Listening to louder noises to "train" the ears and increase their tolerance to loud sounds.
